title: 1.1: Tests that WebSocket connection returns successful status when connecting via ws:// URL
1.2: Tests that WebSocket connection returns successful status when connecting via wss:// URL with TLS
1.3: Tests that open event handler is invoked when WebSocket connection is established
1.4: Tests that message is echoed back correctly when sent over WebSocket connection
1.5: Tests that pong response is received when ping is sent over WebSocket connection
2.1: All WebSocket tests are placed in the ws module test directory
3.1: All tests use Go testing framework with *testing.T parameter
3.2: All tests follow the Go test naming pattern starting with Test
3.3: All tests use t.Parallel() to enable parallel test execution
3.4: All tests use the testify require or assert package for assertions
4.1: Tests use newTestState helper function to initialize test state
4.2: Tests use tb.Replacer.Replace to substitute URL placeholders
